# Navi.training

Navi.training is an international sailing school offering skipper, powerboat and marine radio training.

## Main pages

- [Russian sailing school](https://navi.training/ru/sailing-school/)
- [Ukrainian sailing school](https://navi.training/ua/sailing-school/)
- [English sailing school](https://navi.training/en/sailing-school/)
- [Sailing articles](https://navi.training/ru/blog/)
- [Contact Navi.training](https://navi.training/ru/contacts/)
